name: canDisturbanceTriggerEnable
title: canDisturbanceTriggerEnable
syntax: long canDisturbanceTriggerEnable(long deviceID, canStressNGErrorFrameTrigger trigger, canStressNGFrameSequence sequence); //form 1
long canDisturbanceTriggerEnable(long deviceID, canDisturbanceErrorFrameTrigger trigger, canDisturbanceFrameSequence sequence, canStressNGTriggerRepetitions repetitions); //form 2
long canDisturbanceTriggerEnable(long deviceID, canDisturbanceErrorFrameTrigger trigger, canDisturbanceFrameSequence sequence, canDisturbanceTriggerRepetitions repetitions, dword flags); // form 3
description: Configures an error frame trigger and a user-defined frame-based output sequence on a CAN Disturbance Interface.
If the trigger condition is fulfilled, the frame based sequence is sent on the bus.
It is possible to configure the trigger for the error flag or the error delimiter.
The position within the error flag or delimiter is configurable.
A typical use case is to start sending a frame after the error delimiter.

parameters.name: deviceID
parameters.description: The unique device ID that is configured via the Network Hardware Configuration dialog for a CAN channel.

parameters.name: trigger
parameters.description: The frame trigger condition for the CAN Disturbance Interface to output the sequence.

parameters.name: sequence
parameters.description: The user-defined frame based sequence that is sent, if the external trigger is fulfilled.

parameters.name: repetitions
parameters.description: The trigger repetitions. If the trigger repetitions are not defined, the CAN Disturbance Interface uses default values.

parameters.name: 0x0
parameters.description: No digital input (DIN) is used as trigger enable for the trigger condition.

parameters.name: 0x1
parameters.description: If DIN0 is 0, the trigger is enabled

parameters.name: 0x2
parameters.description: If DIN0 is 1, the trigger is enabled

parameters.name: 0x4
parameters.description: If DIN1 is 0, the trigger is enabled

parameters.name: 0x8
parameters.description: If DIN1 is 1, the trigger is enabled

parameters.name: 0x10
parameters.description: 0: Inverted trigger is disabled 1: Inverted trigger is enabled

parameters.name: 0x20
parameters.description: 0: Direction trigger is disabled 1: Direction trigger is enabled

parameters.name: 0x40
parameters.description: 0: Direction trigger is disabled 1: Direction trigger is enabled

parameters.name: 0x80
parameters.description: Trigger also, trigger position is not included within frame.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
